allow: PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25; "build exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 18; "build exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 14; "build exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);for\(const r of j.query.search\)console.log\(r.title+'  \('+Math.round\(r.size/1024\)+' KB page\)'\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);for\(const p of Object.values\(j.query.pages\)\){const ii=p.imageinfo?.[0];console.log\(p.title,'->',ii?ii.width+'x'+ii.height+' '+ii.mime+' license='+\(ii.extmetadata?.LicenseShortName?.value??'?'\):'no info'\);}}\)")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $p='c:\\Users\\GG\\Projects\\Personal\\IcelandHistoryMap\\public\\ortelius-islandia.jpg'; $src=[System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\($p\); Write-Host "src: $\($src.Width\)x$\($src.Height\)"; $rect=New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(150,197,2314,1649\); $dst=$src.Clone\($rect,$src.PixelFormat\); $codec=[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageCodecInfo]::GetImageEncoders\(\)|Where-Object{$_.MimeType -eq 'image/jpeg'}; $ep=New-Object System.Drawing.Imaging.EncoderParameters\(1\); $ep.Param[0]=New-Object System.Drawing.Imaging.EncoderParameter\([System.Drawing.Imaging.Encoder]::Quality,[long]82\); $out='c:\\Users\\GG\\Projects\\Personal\\IcelandHistoryMap\\public\\ortelius-cropped.jpg'; $dst.Save\($out,$codec,$ep\); $src.Dispose\(\); $dst.Dispose\(\); Get-Item $out | Select-Object Name,Length)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $p='c:\\Users\\GG\\Projects\\Personal\\IcelandHistoryMap\\public\\ortelius-islandia.jpg'; $src=[System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\($p\); $rect=New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(150,197,2306,1627\); $dst=$src.Clone\($rect,$src.PixelFormat\); $codec=[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageCodecInfo]::GetImageEncoders\(\)|Where-Object{$_.MimeType -eq 'image/jpeg'}; $ep=New-Object System.Drawing.Imaging.EncoderParameters\(1\); $ep.Param[0]=New-Object System.Drawing.Imaging.EncoderParameter\([System.Drawing.Imaging.Encoder]::Quality,[long]82\); $out='c:\\Users\\GG\\Projects\\Personal\\IcelandHistoryMap\\public\\ortelius-final.jpg'; $dst.Save\($out,$codec,$ep\); $src.Dispose\(\); $dst.Dispose\(\); Remove-Item 'c:\\Users\\GG\\Projects\\Personal\\IcelandHistoryMap\\public\\ortelius-cropped.jpg' -Force; Move-Item $out $p -Force; Get-Item $p | Select-Object Name,Length)
Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:5173 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')

PowerShell(foreach \($k in 'msedge.exe','chrome.exe','firefox.exe','brave.exe'\) { foreach \($root in 'HKLM:','HKCU:'\) { $p = "$root\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\App Paths\\$k"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "$k -> $\(\(Get-ItemProperty $p\).'\(default\)'\)" } } })
PowerShell(npm ls playwright puppeteer 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 6; \(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts)
PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "build exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")
